name: android-libutils
title: android-libutils
description:
Android Utility Function Library
This library provides miscellaneous utility functions.
.
This library is only used by Android SDK currently.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libutils because Android Utility Function Library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libutils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libutils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libutils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
